backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat backend, defining types and state for messages, chatrooms, user profiles, reactions, and active users, with functions for access control, profile management, messaging, and moderation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the send button visibility fix in MessageInput.tsx to its relevant components, test IDs, and confidence level.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a versioned module script tag, and a single root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, conditionally rendering the Header and Footer based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to upload a custom image, remove their avatar, or select a GIF from Giphy (trending or searched) as their profile avatar.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that renders filtered messages, handles auto-scroll and scroll-to-target-message, manages reply context, and composes the pinned video, message list, and message input areas.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Renders a card for a chatroom with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, displaying topic, category, live status, and participant counts.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Dialog form for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post), including validation and upload progress.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Modal dialog that warns users they are leaving the app when clicking an external link, showing the target URL and requiring confirmation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation for chatroom routes, inline username editing with alphanumeric validation, and an avatar picker.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders a single chat message bubble with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GIFs), URL link detection, voice message playback, and report functionality.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat message input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and automatic detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs in typed text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: A voice message playback component featuring a play/pause toggle, a randomized waveform visualization, a seek slider, and time display, with support for pausing other concurrent audio elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay, returning the latest settled value after the delay period.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Ensures the chatroom list is freshly fetched when the actor becomes ready by purging stale or empty cached entries and explicitly refetching the canonical chatrooms query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-access layer exposing React Query hooks and mutations for chatrooms, messages, reactions, and user identity, along with image upload and localStorage-based username/avatar utilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH color space, and includes custom styles for mobile inputs, voice message range sliders, and layout.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy-loader for the html2canvas library.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using an HTML canvas, skipping GIFs/SVGs and falling back to the original file if compression fails or increases size.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache-key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail caching utility.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility module exporting functions to extract video/clip IDs and generate thumbnail/embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X links.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering, and allows admins to delete chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, handles loading/error states, increments view count on load, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message ID from query params.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying a searchable, filterable, and algorithmically sorted list of chatrooms with options to create a new chatroom and navigate into existing ones.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current known issue (send button clipping in chat input) and the associated fix feature request targeting the MessageInput component layout.
